title: Xiphopteris luetzelburgii
taxonomy: Xiphopteris luetzelburgii is a species within the family Dryopteridaceae, a family of ferns. The genus Xiphopteris is part of the larger class Polypodiopsida. Xiphopteris luetzelburgii is further classified as part of the order Polypodiales. This classification places Xiphopteris luetzelburgii within the kingdom Plantae. Its classification also includes being part of the phylum Tracheophyta.
